message:
Add comprehensive tests for serve, handoff, and bv packages

- scanner_test.go: Add 431 lines testing scanner initialization, process
  detection, agent discovery, and session scanning with mock data
- server_test.go: Add 224 lines testing HTTP server lifecycle, endpoint
  routing, request handling, and graceful shutdown behavior
- transfer_test.go: Add 113 lines testing handoff transfer operations,
  session state serialization, and recovery scenarios
- handoff_test.go: Add handoff coordination tests for multi-agent scenarios
- client_pure_test.go: Add 65 lines of pure function tests for bv client
  request building and response parsing

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
